docstrings.MemoryUsage: A Scrapy extension to monitor and report memory usage during crawling.
docstrings.MemoryUsage.engine_started: Signal handler called when the Scrapy engine starts to initialize memory monitoring tasks.
docstrings.MemoryUsage.engine_stopped: Signal handler called when the Scrapy engine stops to clean up monitoring tasks.
docstrings.MemoryUsage.from_crawler: Factory method to create a MemoryUsage instance from a crawler object.
docstrings.MemoryUsage.get_virtual_size: Retrieve the current virtual memory size in bytes.
docstrings.MemoryUsage.update: Update the maximum memory usage recorded in the crawler stats.
